channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: Meta picks Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan for El Paso data center financing, source says
item.description: Meta in March boosted its investment in the planned El Paso AI data center by more than sixfold to $10 billion, ‌as it aims to reach 1 gigawatt of ​capacity ahead of the facility’s projected 2028 opening [Meta]

item.title: Yotta Data said to hire advisors for $900 million India IPO
item.description: Yotta Data Services Pvt. is weighing an initial public offering in Mumbai that could raise as much as $900 million and has engaged investment banks for the process, according to people familiar with the matter.

item.title: Amazon’s Durability
item.description: Amazon looked behind in AI in the training era, but is well place in the inference era, thanks to its continued investment in the long-term. [Amazon]

item.title: Three months after raising $30bn, Alphabet taps the euro market again
item.description: Three months after a $30bn multi-currency raise, Google’s parent is back. The euro tranches expand one of the most active corporate borrowing programmes of the AI cycle. Three months after raising more than $30bn in a multi-currency global debt issue, Alphabe… [Alphabet]
